summary: Save important decisions as experiences immediately - chat history gets compacted and lost
problem: You make a significant architectural decision mid-session, it gets compacted away, and two sessions later you repeat the same analysis or make the opposite choice
solution: When you reach a non-obvious decision (why you chose library A over B, why you structured data this way), save it as an experience entry right then. One sentence of reasoning is enough to prevent rediscovery
root_cause: Compaction keeps outcomes but discards the reasoning chain. Without saved rationale, future sessions treat settled questions as open ones
